file_name: SightLife Surgical, Inc. - STRATEGIC SALES _ MARKETING AGREEMENT.txt

perturbation.original_text: 2. Effective Date; Term and Termination. 2.1. This Agreement shall be effective on the later of the dates that it is executed by Imprimis and Surgical (the "Effective Date") and shall terminate pursuant to the terms of the SOW (the "Term").
perturbation.changed_text: 2. Effective Date; Term and Termination. 2.1. This Agreement shall be effective on the later of the dates that it is executed by Imprimis and Surgical (the "Effective Date").
perturbation.explanation: By omitting the phrase 'and shall terminate pursuant to the terms of the SOW (the "Term")', Section 2.1 creates an in-text contradiction. The agreement now lacks a clear termination clause, potentially leading to disputes over the Term's duration. Because the the section mentions SOW it also references Appendix A, which defines the Term as well, this missing clause, therefore, makes it ambiguous.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Surgical will provide sales representation services to Imprimis during the Term of this Agreement (Surgical and its sales representatives may be referred to collectively hereinafter as Surgical). The sales representation services ("Services") are set forth in the Statement of Work ("SOW") that is attached hereto as Appendix A and made a part hereof, as it may be amended from time to time by the parties hereto.
perturbation.justification: The omission of the phrase 'and shall terminate pursuant to the terms of the SOW (the "Term")' from Section 2.1 directly contradicts the Contradicted Text which states 'Surgical will provide sales representation services to Imprimis during the Term of this Agreement'. Without a defined term in Section 2.1, the duration of Surgical's services, as referenced in the Contradicted Text, becomes ambiguous and unenforceable, thus creating a direct conflict. As the explanation describes, because the section mentions SOW it also references Appendix A, which defines the Term as well, this missing clause, therefore, makes it ambiguous.

perturbation.original_text: In consideration of the Services provided hereunder, Imprimis shall pay Surgical sales commissions ("Sales Commissions") as set forth in the SOW. Surgical shall be responsible for all expenses incurred in association with performance of the Services.
perturbation.changed_text: In consideration of the Services provided hereunder, Imprimis shall pay Surgical sales commissions ("Sales Commissions"). Surgical shall be responsible for all expenses incurred in association with performance of the Services.
perturbation.explanation: Removing the phrase 'as set forth in the SOW' from Section 3 creates an in-text contradiction, creating an omission that makes the commission structure ambiguous. Without reference to the SOW, the basis for calculating the Sales Commissions is undefined, making enforcement uncertain and also is mentioned at the SOW Appendix A. The SOW details the percentages and conditions for the commission payments, and taking it away is the same as removing the payment.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Within sixty (60) days after the end of each calendar quarter during the Term, Imprimis shall deliver to Surgical a report setting forth for such calendar quarter the calculation of the applicable Sales Commission due under this Agreement for the sale of the Product (as defined in the SOW). Imprimis shall remit the total Sales Commission payments due for the sale of Product during such calendar quarter at the time such report is made.
perturbation.justification: The removal of 'as set forth in the SOW' from the Changed Text introduces a contradiction because it removes the defined basis for calculating sales commissions. The Contradicted Text explicitly states that Imprimis will deliver a report detailing the calculation of the Sales Commission 'due under this Agreement for the sale of the Product (as defined in the SOW)'. Without the reference to the SOW in the Changed Text, the method for calculating the commission is undefined, directly conflicting with the Contradicted Text which assumes a clear calculation method exists as defined in the SOW. This creates uncertainty and makes the commission structure ambiguous and unenforceable, resulting in a direct and strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 9. Compliance with Laws and Quality Standards. As further outlined in the SOW, Surgical and its employees shall conduct all activities under this Agreement or relating to the Product in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations and all quality standards, protocols and systems established by Imprimis from time to time therefor.
perturbation.changed_text: 9. Compliance with Laws and Quality Standards. Surgical and its employees shall conduct all activities under this Agreement or relating to the Product in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations and all quality standards, protocols and systems established by Imprimis from time to time therefor.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting the phrase 'As further outlined in the SOW,' Section 9 introduces an in-text contradiction. The original text clarifies that the SOW contains further details regarding compliance, but the modified text removes this reference. This makes Surgical's obligation to follow any further guidances unclear. The compliance is not clear because the SOW contains the information on those further guidances.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Statement of Work under Strategic Sales & Marketing Agreement by and between SightLife Surgical, Inc. and Imprimis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Services: Surgical will provide "Services" for Imprimis and its subsidiaries which shall include: 1. In coordination with Imprimis, calling on potential clients including, but not limited to, doctors, practitioners, practice groups, surgical centers, hospitals and other prescribers (collectively "Clients") and assisting in the promotion, marketing and generation of inbound sales and prescription orders for the Product in the Territory. 2. Opening new Client accounts, servicing existing Client accounts, promoting products, facilitating sales orders and handling customer services for Clients in the Territory, including interfacing with the Imprimis customer service team and the Imprimis commercial sales team on a regular basis. 3. Providing a dedicated sales staff of four (4) Surgical employees (the "Sales Team") in the provision of the Services. The Sales Team shall have specific and sufficient related ophthalmic experience and relationships with potential purchasers of the Product to adequately provide the Services.
perturbation.justification: By removing 'As further outlined in the SOW,' Section 9 creates a contradiction with the Statement of Work (SOW). The original text acknowledges that the SOW contains further details regarding compliance, specifically relating to Surgical's services, promotion, marketing, and sales of the product. By removing this reference, it becomes unclear what guidelines Surgical must adhere to, thus creating a contradiction.
